title: Scattergories

buttons.skipLetterTooltip: Get a different random letter for this round
buttons.resetTooltip: Start the timer over from the beginning
buttons.addTooltip: Add this category to your custom collection

categories.title: Categories
categories.minimumRequired: Add at least one custom category to use Custom mode.

shortcuts: Shortcuts: Space next round, R skip letter, P pause, N new game, C categories, A add custom

footer.privacy: This app uses localStorage to save your settings and custom categories locally in your browser. No data is sent to any server.

modal.title: How to Play Scattergories
modal.objectiveText: Score points by writing down words that start with a given letter and fit the categories.
gameplayPoints: A letter is randomly selected and displayed
You have a limited time (default 90 seconds) to write answers
All answers must start with the given letter
Each category must have a unique answer (no duplicates across categories)
scoringPoints: 1 point: Your word is unique (no one else wrote it)
0 points: Someone else also wrote the same word
Uncommon, creative answers are often more valuable!
modal.categoriesText: This tool draws categories from the official Scattergories game. You can also create custom categories and mix them with the defaults.
featuresList: Use the Skip Letter button (or press R) to get a new letter
Toggle Pause (press P) during a round to think
Adjust timer duration and number of rounds in Settings
modal.footer: This is a helper tool to manage the letter and timer. Have fun with friends!

theme.toggleTooltip: Switch between light and dark theme
